zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Bohun於1235年9月出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，她的父親Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun27歲，母親Maud de Lusignan26歲。她和Roger de Tosny至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1264年5月24日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Bohun was born in September 1235, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, was 27 and her mother, Maud de Lusignan, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Roger de Tosny. She died on 24 May 1264, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Bohun est née en septembre 1235, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lusignan, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Roger de Tosny. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1264, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Bohun im September 1235 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun 27 und ihre Mutter Maud de Lusignan 26. Sie hatte mit Roger de Tosny mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1264 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Roger de Tosny. Morì il 24 maggio 1264, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Bohunが1235年9月にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Earl Humphrey IV de Bohunは27歳，母Maud de Lusignanは26歳であった。彼女はRoger de Tosnyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1264年5月24日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Bohun(이)가 1235년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Lusignan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Tosny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 5월 24일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Roger de Tosny. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1264, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Bohun родилась сентябрь 1235 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lusignan, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Roger de Tosny. Она умерла 24 мая 1264 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
